ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight SH1234: New York to London
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Here are your flight details:

Flight: SH1234
Date: 2026-05-15
Departure: New York JFK – 08:30 AM (local time)
Arrival: London Heathrow – 08:45 PM (local time)
Seat: 12A, Window
Gate: 22

Check‑in: Available from 24 hours before departure until 30 minutes before departure. Please use the following link to check in online: <URL>

Flight status and additional information can be found on our website: <URL>

If you have any questions or need to change your booking, please contact our customer support at 1-800-123-4567 or email support@skyhighairlines.com.

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines. We wish you a pleasant journey.

Sincerely,

SkyHigh Airlines Team
